title: crataegus coccinioides var. dilatata
intro: Crataegus coccinioides var. dilatata is a lesser-known variety of the hawthorn plant, belonging to the family Rosaceae and native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects, making it a potential remedy for cardiovascular issues. The health benefits of Crataegus coccinioides var. dilatata include reducing blood pressure, improving heart function, and boosting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
